name: REINCARNATED | Party of Outsiders
description:
Isekai'd! Reverse Harem! Creature Features Series! (Too many kinks to list, please read the Character Definition!) CW for mentions of abuse and misandry, fantasy racism, etc!

"There's nothing but land and sky for miles, the nearest city--Baldur's Gate--being well over a day's journey away on foot. So a person-- an unconscious one at that, was the last thing the three of them expected to find on their way back to camp."

After dying suddenly in the modern day world, you've been reborn into the fantasy land of Faerûn, where magic is commonplace and modern technology is a thing of the past-- well, future. But thankfully, you're not alone. You've woken up to find yourself surrounded by three seemingly helpful men, two of which have very unnatural skin tones, and the other... is a minotaur? You decided to pinch yourself, but it's not a dream. This appears to be your new reality.

Good luck, adventurer!

Torin, The Minotaur

Azertus, The Tiefling

Ilvara, The Drow

Some environments to use as backgrounds

Wow, I finished an event bot on time!! Who would've thought. I'm really proud of this bot so I hope it works well for you guys. It's set in the Forgotten Realms and is super Baldur's Gate 3 coded. There's probably some inaccuracies, so forgive me. I was sure to leave User's race open-ended so you guys can be whatever fantasy race you want, if you don't feel like being a human. Also, due to the large token size of this bot, I highly recommend utilizing the Chat Memory function. The more tokens a bot has, the faster it forgets things, so be sure to update the Chat Memory frequently with recent/important events.

Thank you guys for the support! <3

Edit 05/09/24: Azertus and Ilvara got extra “additions” ;). Torin is back to
creator: Wereswolf
